title: Architectural Competition Presentation Board AI
sourceTitle: Architectural Competition Presentation Board AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Complete bilingual architectural competition presentation board for modern courtyard library, using a pure white background, post-digital collage structure, and Chinese ink-wash atmosphere. Subject: modern courtyard library is presented as a modern Chinese architectural proposal with a prominent vermilion structural frame, white walls, grey roof tiles, and 画面点缀着身着传统服饰的建筑配景人物。 for cultural scale and atmosphere. Scene: Professional architecture portfolio board on a pure white background, with clean sky whitespace, a red sun, classical cloud-line motifs, and poetic quiet cultural atmosphere. Composition: Fixed multi-panel competition-board layout: full-width architectural section perspective at top, oversized detailed CAD floor plan in the middle, right-side vertical concept diagrams and circular landscape details, bottom row of three rectangular interior and exterior views, with section perspective, CAD plan, concept diagrams, landscape details, interior views integrated into the hierarchy. Signature Elements: Top section perspective, central CAD plan, right concept diagrams, circular landscape details, bottom rendering strip, section perspective, CAD plan, concept diagrams, landscape details, interior views, red structural frame, red sun, cloud-line drawing, and 画面点缀着身着传统服饰的建筑配景人物。 Style: Master-level architectural representation with post-digital collage, Chinese ink-wash mood, precise CAD drawing language, portfolio-grade spacing, elegant editorial restraint, and extremely rich but organized detail. Color Palette: Pure white board field, black and grey CAD linework, vermilion red structural accents, white wall surfaces, grey roof tiles, subtle ink-wash neutrals, red sun detail, and restrained annotation tones. Lighting: Soft bright diffuse lighting with calm cultural atmosphere, clean white negative space, delicate shadows, and readable diagram contrast. Materials: Red timber structure, white plaster wall, grey tile roof, ink-wash paper texture, watercolor bleeding, fine CAD linework, and hand-rendered architectural annotation texture. Typography: Bilingual Chinese and English presentation typography with staggered elegant serif titles, paragraph text blocks as graphic elements, fine leader-line annotations, short labels, and clear hierarchy. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

prompt: Theme: Complete bilingual architectural competition presentation board for modern courtyard library, using a pure white background, post-digital collage structure, and Chinese ink-wash atmosphere. Subject: modern courtyard library is presented as a modern Chinese architectural proposal with a prominent vermilion structural frame, white walls, grey roof tiles, and 画面点缀着身着传统服饰的建筑配景人物。 for cultural scale and atmosphere. Scene: Professional architecture portfolio board on a pure white background, with clean sky whitespace, a red sun, classical cloud-line motifs, and poetic quiet cultural atmosphere. Composition: Fixed multi-panel competition-board layout: full-width architectural section perspective at top, oversized detailed CAD floor plan in the middle, right-side vertical concept diagrams and circular landscape details, bottom row of three rectangular interior and exterior views, with section perspective, CAD plan, concept diagrams, landscape details, interior views integrated into the hierarchy. Signature Elements: Top section perspective, central CAD plan, right concept diagrams, circular landscape details, bottom rendering strip, section perspective, CAD plan, concept diagrams, landscape details, interior views, red structural frame, red sun, cloud-line drawing, and 画面点缀着身着传统服饰的建筑配景人物。 Style: Master-level architectural representation with post-digital collage, Chinese ink-wash mood, precise CAD drawing language, portfolio-grade spacing, elegant editorial restraint, and extremely rich but organized detail. Color Palette: Pure white board field, black and grey CAD linework, vermilion red structural accents, white wall surfaces, grey roof tiles, subtle ink-wash neutrals, red sun detail, and restrained annotation tones. Lighting: Soft bright diffuse lighting with calm cultural atmosphere, clean white negative space, delicate shadows, and readable diagram contrast. Materials: Red timber structure, white plaster wall, grey tile roof, ink-wash paper texture, watercolor bleeding, fine CAD linework, and hand-rendered architectural annotation texture. Typography: Bilingual Chinese and English presentation typography with staggered elegant serif titles, paragraph text blocks as graphic elements, fine leader-line annotations, short labels, and clear hierarchy. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
